hero.title1: Your clean-skin reset in Kuala Lumpur,
hero.desc: Deep cleanse. Gentle suction. Fresh hydration. You walk out looking rested, not red. Made for Malaysia's heat, humidity, and city-life buildup.

skinTalk.issue1: KL heat and humidity clogging your pores
skinTalk.desc: A hydra facial isn't random pampering. It's a practical reset that cleans, clears, and hydrates in one go. Most notice the glow fast. The better part? How smooth your skin feels tomorrow.

whatIs.title: What is a hydra facial?
whatIs.desc: A non-invasive, multi-step facial combining cleansing, exfoliation, gentle suction, and hydration with skin serums.
whatIs.quote: "Like a regular facial, but your pores actually feel something real happened."

whyKL.reason1: Fits a busy week - no downtime needed
whyKL.reason2: Perfect when humidity congests your face
whyKL.reason4: Safe for Malaysian skin tones when done right
whyKL.helps3: Dehydrated skin that still looks shiny

whoFor.title: Who it's for
whoFor.pause1: Active skin infection or cold sore

results.title: What results can you expect?
results.immediateDesc: Cleaner pores, softer texture, better hydration
results.lastDesc: Varies with skincare and sun exposure. Monthly maintenance recommended.

prosCons.title: Pros & Cons
prosCons.desc: The honest version, because you deserve to know
prosCons.pro1: No real downtime for most people
prosCons.pro2: Good first treatment if you're nervous
prosCons.con2: Deep acne scars need other options too

cost.priceDesc: Hydrafacial Deep Cleanse at Nexus Clinic KL
cost.marketRange: Market range: RM600-800 per session at other KL clinics. Compare what's included - some "cheap" promos exclude boosters or use different machines.
cost.affectsNote: Consultation clarifies what you're actually booking

comparison.title: Hydra facial vs other treatments
comparison.comp3Point3: Event prep with risk vs safe glow

prepAftercare.prep1: Pause strong actives if skin is sensitive

faq.title: People Also Ask
faq.a1: A non-invasive facial combining cleansing, exfoliation, extraction, and hydration in one session using a device and serums.
faq.q2: Is HydraFacial suitable for all skin types?
faq.a2: Yes, including sensitive skin - it can be adjusted to your needs. Always check first if you have active issues.
faq.a3: Most describe it as comfortable, with gentle suction rather than squeezing.
faq.q4: How long does a session take?
faq.a4: Around 1 to 1.5 hours, depending on your plan and add-ons.
faq.a5: Usually mild redness or tingling that settles quickly. Rarely, temporary sensitivity or breakouts.
faq.q6: How many sessions do I need?
faq.a6: You'll see improvement after one, but monthly maintenance is recommended for ongoing results.
faq.q7: Can HydraFacial help with oily skin and blackheads?
faq.a7: Yes - suction helps lift oil and debris from pores without squeezing.
faq.a8: No downtime - you can return to normal activities right away.

cta.desc1: If your skin feels clogged, dull, or just tired from KL heat,
cta.desc2: a Hydrafacial Deep Cleanse is a clean place to start.
cta.address: Nexus Clinic Kuala Lumpur • LG 10, Wisma UOA II, Jalan Pinang
